# Nextscale

> Nextscale is an AI-first technology company from Odisha, India that builds AI products, AI agents, business websites, and digital-growth services for clinics and small-to-medium businesses across India. Founded in 2024 by Abhisek, a self-taught founder.

Contact: biz.abhisek@gmail.com · WhatsApp preferred · Serves all of India · Based in Bhubaneswar, Odisha.

## What Nextscale offers

- **AI Agents** — WhatsApp AI receptionist that books appointments, sends reminders, qualifies leads, requests Google reviews, and runs follow-ups 24/7. Goes live in 48 hours. Plans: Starter ₹5,999/mo, Growth ₹12,999/mo, Enterprise ₹24,999/mo.
- **Websites** — Custom, mobile-first, SEO-ready business websites live in 7 days. Plans from ₹4,999.
- **Digital Growth** — Google Business setup, local SEO, and social presence with monthly growth reports.

## Products

- **ExamOS** (Beta) — AI-powered exam prep for India: AI-generated mock tests, previous-year-question analysis, and performance tracking for NEET, CUET, IBPS, SSC CGL, OSSSC, and OPSC.
- **Aura** (Coming Soon) — Voice-based AI English fluency coach with real-time pronunciation feedback, built on Deepgram, Claude, and Sarvam AI.

## Key facts

- Free 2-week trial on AI agents; no credit card required.
- No lock-in — cancel anytime with full data export.
- Payment via UPI, bank transfer, or monthly billing; no international card needed.
- AI agents live in 48 hours, websites in 7 days.
- 25+ websites shipped, 12+ AI agents live, 2 products, 8 books, 10+ digital products.
